payload.author: claude
payload.body: EPIC DONE. Scope hosted is now genuinely shareable: a project IS an isolated tenant board (PG event log + replica serving), tenancy from the authenticated subject only, owner/member/viewer roles enforced across REST+sync+SSE, RLS defense-in-depth, hashed single-use invites with a web UI (create/switch/members/invite/rename/archive), actor aliases for local-history sync, CLI project awareness (scope projects / remote.json), and LAN gossip as the no-central-host stretch. Verified: 290/290 tests x3 consecutive runs + live browser walkthrough of the full invite->join->collaborate loop.
